ksa_text: Skill in building executive alignment for data and AI transformation programs, including stakeholder mapping, coalition building, and resistant stakeholder engagement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Collaborate with stakeholders to identify and/or develop appropriate solutions technology.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy falls outside the primary competency scope of the Data and AI Research Scientist. This skill KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Leadership & Strategy truly out-of-scope for the Data and AI Research Scientist? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Leadership & Strategy as a core or recommended competency for the Data and AI Research Scientist. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Leadership & Strategy falls outside the established competency profile for the Data and AI Research Scientist. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy is outside the competency scope of the Data and AI Research Scientist. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
